problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
mechanism: Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations
hypothesis: Combining Optogenetic control of specific neuron populations with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
